channel.title: Principal Engineer on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Principal Engineer on simeononsecurity

item.title: Software Engineering Technical Tracks: Staff, Principal, and Architect Paths
item.category: "staff engineer career path" , "principal engineer" , "software architect career" , "IC track vs management track" , "staff engineer vs engineering manager" , "software engineer technical ladder" , "individual contributor career path" , "growing as a developer"
item.description: Understand the individual contributor technical ladder beyond senior engineer — staff engineer, principal engineer, distinguished engineer, and architect roles — and what it takes to advance.

item.title: Technical vs. Management Track in IT: Choosing Your Career Path
item.category: "technical vs management track it" , "it management career path" , "individual contributor vs manager" , "it career path decision" , "staff engineer vs it manager" , "principal engineer" , "moving up in it" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Compare the individual contributor (IC) technical ladder against the management track in IT and learn how to choose the right career path for your goals.

item.title: What Does a Software Developer Career Path Look Like?
item.category: "software developer career path" , "junior to senior developer" , "software engineer levels" , "developer career progression" , "staff engineer" , "principal engineer" , "engineering manager career path" , "software engineering levels" , "developer career roadmap"
item.description: Understand the typical software developer career progression from junior developer to senior, staff, principal engineer, or engineering manager, including what skills and timelines to expect at each level.
